Server is running healthy. Here's a summary of what was done:

---

**Changes made to `/mnt/data/discord-server/src/index.ts`:**

1. **SSE keepalive pings** — Added a 20-second interval that writes `:keepalive\n\n` SSE comments to all active streams via their internal `controller.enqueue()`. If a write fails (dead stream), the stream is cleaned up and removed from the mapping. This surfaces dead connections within 20 seconds instead of letting them linger indefinitely.
